root_cause: CVR improved +3.78pp — S2C +7.0pp and C2O +7.5pp driven by the April 15 launch of exp 36426 (Alcatraz with Ferry & Audio Guide, $47.95) displacing the $87.30 Self-Guided Tour App as dominant listing. The 46% price reduction removed friction at variant selection (S2C) and checkout (C2A +9.9pp). International visitors benefited most: Canada +25pp, Australia +22pp, UK +8pp S2C. Only residual gap: A2O slipped −2.24pp, likely reflecting higher payment friction from the increased share of international visitors.
